2295740.name: AstroPuffs
2295740.description:
This project is being re-worked. The original details have been removed but the page will be re-established when we have more to share with you.

Our original idea proved to be too ambitious for us to feasibly achieve.

We still plan to release something at a future date, and we will still use this page to do that, but it won't be the same as what we originally envisioned.

Our of respect to you, our audience, we want to be transparent.

If you previously wish-listed this project then we understand that you may not wish to keep it. But we hope you to see you again when we're ready.
